entry.title: New: CR 25-76 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 110, CD1 (2024), to except certain properties destroyed or damaged by the August 8, 2023, Maui wildfires, where the cost to rebuild or repair the structure will exceed 50 percent of the replacement value of the structure as of August 8, 2023, from the requirement of improving public streets.

Water and Infrastructure Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
